name: Release Notes v3.10.0 - POS and Back Office
body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Release Notes v3.10.0 - POS and Back Office"}], "data-id": "release-notes-v3-10-0-pos-and-back-office"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Release Date:", "bold": true}, {"text": " 28th November 2019"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this release we've introduced some great new time-saving features, made it easier than ever to set up your price groups and loyalty scheme for your customers, and even introduced some new POS themes so you can personalise Retail Express! Along with our exciting headline features, there's also a total of 21"}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Improvements and Resolutions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this release:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#default-price-group", "children": [{"text": "Default Price Group for customers"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#voucher-expiry", "children": [{"text": "Configurable Voucher Type Settings"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#pos-themes", "children": [{"text": "New POS themes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#accounting-report", "children": [{"text": "New accounting report for reconciling surcharges"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#shopify-placeholder", "children": [{"text": "Shopify automatic sync"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#email-placeholder", "children": [{"text": "Email address placeholder on newsletters"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#improvements", "children": [{"text": "Improvements and Resolutions"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "More information on all these features can be found below."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}]}, {"text": "Default Price Groups for Customers", "bold": true}], "data-id": "default-price-groups-for-customers"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can now set a default Price Group for customers when they're created - a great way to encourage customers to create accounts (both online and instore). For example, new customers can be automatically added to VIP groups and instantly start earning discounts on all transactions."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Combine this with the Loyalty system to create an automated Loyalty program, increasing discounts as customers reach certain points thresholds e.g. start at the Bronze level by default, and increase to silver, gold etc."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To configure the default Price Group:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", Using the new settings you can configure each of the expiry dates by default, and update the Voucher Text to explain the terms and conditions."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The ACCC introduced new requirements for Gift Voucher expiry periods in November 2019."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access the new settings:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > POS Settings > Voucher Settings", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "pencil icon ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to edit the required Voucher Type"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Update", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}]}, {"text": "POS Themes", "bold": true}], "data-id": "pos-themes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Personalise Retail Express with new POS themes! [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The report will then display for you information on the order, including the surcharge value (both including and excluding tax, and the tax value
